raw.problem: Farmers cannot see micro-climate risk until crops have already failed.
raw.why_now: Cheap IoT sensors and better models make per-field forecasting viable.
raw.proof_of_work: 3,000-farm pilot in Maharashtra showing 8% yield lift.
raw.gtm: B2B2C via cooperatives and input retailers.
raw.success_scenario: If yields rise 8%, retention compounds annually.
raw.team_edge: Agronomy + ML team from IIT Kharagpur.

structured.tagline: Farmers foresee micro-climate risk before crop failure, lifting yields.
structured.problem: Farmers cannot see micro-climate risk until crops have already failed.
structured.differentiator: Per-field micro-climate forecasts with pilot-proven 8% yield lift by agronomy+ML team.
structured.solution: Per-field micro-climate risk forecasting via IoT sensors and ML models.
structured.ask: Seeking pilot partners for climate-advisory rollout to farmer orgs.
